prose:
**Pyridine HOMO–LUMO gap** — DFT, **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (tier `standard`, density-fitted in PySCF), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied fixed structure from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz` (not optimized in this run). SCF converged in 10 cycles. Frontier orbital energies: HOMO = −7.2526 eV, LUMO = −1.1128 eV → gap = **6.1398 eV** (Koopmans orbital-energy gap, not an excitation energy). Koopmans-derived quantities: vertical IP = 7.2526 eV, vertical EA = 1.1128 eV, electronegativity = 4.1827 eV, chemical hardness = 3.0699 eV, electrophilicity index = 2.8494 eV. Electronic energy = −248.3782 Hartree. Integrity status: trustworthy (energy finite, SCF converged, schema valid). No warnings reported.</prose>
